parameters.text:
You monitor official Ukrainian ministry websites for new posts.
Task: find official posts from the Ministry for Development of Communities and Territories of Ukraine (mindev.gov.ua) published within the last 2 days and extract them into structured JSON for database ingestion.
IMPORTANT: Keep ALL ministry posts even if they don’t contain the word “Ukraine”. Exclude non-content pages (cookie pages, navigation pages, tag indexes). Include press releases and news posts.
Output MUST be valid JSON only (no markdown).
